빌립보서 3:1.content: Finally, my brothers, rejoice in the Lord! To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not tiresome, but for you it is safe.

빌립보서 3:2.content: Beware of the dogs; beware of the evil workers; beware of the false circumcision.

빌립보서 3:3.content: For we are the circumcision, who worship God in the Spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh;

빌립보서 3:4.content: though I myself might have confidence even in the flesh. If any other man thinks that he has confidence in the flesh, I yet more:

빌립보서 3:5.content: circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew of Hebrews; concerning the law, a Pharisee;

빌립보서 3:6.content: concerning zeal, persecuting the assembly; concerning the righteousness which is in the law, found blameless.

빌립보서 3:7.content: However, I consider those things that were gain to me as a loss for Christ.

빌립보서 3:8.content: Yes most certainly, and I count all things to be a loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus, my Lord, for whom I suffered the loss of all things, and count them nothing but refuse, that I may gain Christ

빌립보서 3:9.content: and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own, that which is of the law, but that which is through faith in Christ, the righteousness which is from God by faith,

빌립보서 3:10.content: that I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, becoming conformed to his death,

빌립보서 3:11.content: if by any means I may attain to the resurrection from the dead.

빌립보서 3:12.content: Not that I have already obtained, or am already made perfect; but I press on, that I may take hold of that for which also I was taken hold of by Christ Jesus.

빌립보서 3:13.content: Brothers, I don’t regard myself as yet having taken hold, but one thing I do: forgetting the things which are behind, and stretching forward to the things which are before,

빌립보서 3:14.content: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

빌립보서 3:15.content: Let us therefore, as many as are perfect, think this way. If in anything you think otherwise, God will also reveal that to you.

빌립보서 3:16.content: Nevertheless, to the extent that we have already attained, let’s walk by the same rule. Let’s be of the same mind.

빌립보서 3:17.content: Brothers, be imitators together of me, and note those who walk this way, even as you have us for an example.

빌립보서 3:18.content: For many walk, of whom I told you often, and now tell you even weeping, as the enemies of the cross of Christ,

빌립보서 3:19.content: whose end is destruction, whose god is the belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who think about earthly things.

빌립보서 3:20.content: For our citizenship is in heaven, from where we also wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ,

빌립보서 3:21.content: who will change the body of our humiliation to be conformed to the body of his glory, according to the working by which he is able even to subject all things to himself.
